note: Resource -> HarvestGround catch dispenser config for /seas/harvest. `ground` is filled by mftusd-build/deploy-harvestground.cjs once the HarvestGround is on-chain. A catch is FREE (no token-in, no gold): the server verifies co-location + reads skill + live supply, computes the deterministic catch (citizen/lib/harvest.js), and signs a dispense ticket. status:'live' + a ground address = usable now; status:'planned' + ground:null = the rail is built but the on-chain ground is founder-gated (server returns an honest 503, never a fake catch).

fish.supplyNote: ocean LP FISH reserve = what the ocean-water keeper produced (deploy/ocean-keeper.js)

crab.locationNote: Bonewater Atoll pier hex (q2,r6) = loc 2006; region 'Bonewater Atolls' = beach terrain. The bottom-rung FREE crab beach (founder: 'they need NOTHING to go crabbing and make coin').
crab.supplyNote: CRABw WaterV2 endowment (yield->GOLD keeper buys crabs + moves them to the beach ground) refills the ground over time; until the keeper runs, seed the ground directly at deploy (deploy-harvestground.cjs --seed).
toGoLive: Deploy a beach CRAB HarvestGround: adapt mftusd-build/deploy-harvestground.cjs (swap FISH->CRAB 0xCc85d9.., LABEL 'Bonewater crab beach', location gate is server-side via this config's `location` 2006), seed initial CRAB stock from treasury.
The script writes `grounds.crab.ground` + flips status to 'live' here (mirror the fish entry).

Restart the seas-server; /seas/harvest {resource:'crab'} then dispenses free crabs to any pawn standing at Bonewater Atoll (loc 2006), skill-scaled, cooldown-gated. Zero code change — pure config activation.
FOUNDER-GATED on-chain step (peg-onehop paused + rogue-check first). The rail, server route, signer, and client are already built + verified.
